title: 続きを進めて。kernelで進めて。 コスト前提を設計に入れます。契約済みの Claude / GPT / GLM を通常ループの主 軸にし、Copilot を低コスト補助、Gemini と xAI は overflow と tie-break に 限定する方針で /kernel 契約を更新します。 • Updated Plan └ Adding a cost-aware redesign layer to /kernel based on the user's subscription and metered-provider constraints. I will encode provi...
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6). Active models: Codex, Claude, GLM Lane manifest: - Codex plan lane: planning role - highest-value next step is a production-mode signed webhook replay against the deployed endpoint - Codex critique lane: review role - biggest residual risk is false-green without end-to-end runtime evidence under real failure conditions - Codex replan lane: decision role - production is runnable only when required checks are green and no unresolved high-severity gaps remain - Codex repair lane: repair role - next pragmatic production proof is an explicit live probe that exercises the remaining hardening path - Claude lane: critique role - auth bridge is live for the current production verification - GLM lane: simulation role - remaining gap is signed webhook plus authenticated checkout/portal success-path verification 継続結果です。production-safe probe では `content-analyzer-theta.vercel.app` が `200`、`create-checkout-session` と `customer-portal` は `OPTIONS 200`、`stripe-webhook` は `GET 405` と unsigned `POST 400` を返しました。これは本番サイトと Supabase Edge Functions が live で、webhook も設定不備で落ちていないことを示します。 現時点の council 判定は `conditional approve` です。本番は runnable ですが、今回の 3 修正を end-to-end で本番確認し切る最後のギャップは 2 点だけです。`valid JWT` 付きの checkout / portal 成功系と、`signed Stripe webhook` の live replay が未検証です。
